name: Goldilocks NTT — Correcciones post-retrospectiva

phases.name: Measure first — separate verification cost from parallelism cost
phases.description: AC-2: Create scalar-only Plonky3 benchmark (no PackedGoldilocksNeon, no inline asm). Produces 3-column table: TRZK verified C | Plonky3 scalar Rust | Plonky3 vectorized. This SEPARATES the gap into verification overhead vs parallelism overhead.

study.notes: Create Rust NTT DIT using Goldilocks::mul/add (NOT PackedGoldilocksNeon). 1 lane, rustc -O. Must use SAME twiddle convention as our NTT for fair comparison. Add plonky3_ntt_forward_scalar FFI to shim. Measure N=2^14,16,18,20. If gap TRZK/P3scalar < 1.2x → verification cost acceptable, gap is parallelism.

blocks.name: Scalar baseline measurement
blocks.gate: 3-column benchmark table published: TRZK | P3 scalar | P3 vectorized

phases.name: Activate built infrastructure
phases.description: AC-1: Turn on useDynamicCost for Goldilocks. The canal dinámico is built (T7+T8) but OFF. Activate it.

study.notes: fieldConfigToUltraConfig line ~465: add useDynamicCost := fc.k > 32. BabyBear stays false. Fallback (diff>5→static) already exists in reductionCostForHW_dynamic:199. Measure if plan CHANGES for Goldilocks.

blocks.name: Activate dynamic cost
blocks.gate: BabyBear PASS identical + Goldilocks PASS + report if plan changed

phases.name: Investigate high-impact optimizations
phases.description: AC-3 (NTT trick viability) + AC-4 (inline asm, conditional on AC-2). READ ONLY — no code changes, only viability documents.

nodes.name: AC-3: NTT trick viability study (READ ONLY)

study.notes: READ ONLY. NTT_64 × NTT_{N/64} reestructura EARLY stages (80% runtime). Unlike TA (late stages = 5% impact), this targets the EXPENSIVE stages. Answer: does NTTStrategy need new ctor? Does NTTStage need per-stage root? Can twiddle table have 2 sections? Does Python ref match with decomposition?

nodes.name: AC-4: Inline asm hot path evaluation (CONDITIONAL)

study.notes: ONLY if AC-2 shows gap > 1.3x between TRZK C and Plonky3 scalar Rust. Evaluate emitting asm for lowerGoldilocksProductReduce. Trust boundary is same (stmtToC already trusted). 1-page document: how much gap closes? Worth complexity?

correctness: Plonky3 scalar benchmark uses SAME twiddle convention (AC-2)
performance: 3-column table: TRZK | P3 scalar | P3 vectorized for N=14,16,18,20 (AC-2)
Pre/post dynamic cost performance comparison for Goldilocks (AC-1)

properties.description: P3 scalar benchmark uses same DIT butterfly structure as TRZK
useDynamicCost=false for BabyBear produces identical plan

dependency_graph: B1 (measure) → B3 (investigate, AC-3+AC-4 parallel). B2 (activate) independent.
